title: Describe table feature not working correctly
description: Describe table feature not working correctly for tables with upper case names.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST_TABLE (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO TEST_TABLE (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Sample Name');
CREATE TABLE ANOTHER_TABLE (ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES TEST_TABLE(id));
INSERT INTO ANOTHER_TABLE (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM TEST_TABLE WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM ANOTHER_TABLE);
key_bug_features: Describe table feature for upper case table names
